name: Ham Loaf II
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground ham, veal, and pork in a large mixing bowl. Add the eggs, bread crumbs, milk, and pepper. Mix well.
2. Press the mixture into a 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic loaf pan.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the mustard and brown sugar. Spread this mixture over the top of the loaf.
4. Pour the pineapple juice over the loaf. Cook, covered with plastic wrap, for 25 minutes in the Microwave Oven. Allow to stand for 5 minutes before serving.
